name: telegram-groups-saas
description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for managing paid Telegram groups

scripts.dev: docker-compose up -d && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:worker
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:worker
scripts.test:watch: concurrently "npm run test:backend -- --watch" "npm run test:frontend -- --watch" "npm run test:worker -- --watch"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:worker
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:frontend && npm run type-check:worker
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules worker/node_modules packages/*/node_modules
